wage_reference.name: GGMMI / RMMMG
wage_reference.source: Guaranteed average minimum monthly income, April 2026
wage_reference.note: Belgian national minimum wage reference for full-time private-sector employees. Sectoral minima may be higher.

social_security.employer_contribution_note: Prototype employer base rate. Structural reductions and sector-specific contributions are not yet simulated.

limits: Personal income tax and withholding tax are not simulated in this V0.
Structural reduction for low wages is not yet simulated.
Sectoral minimum wages are not simulated.
Regional and family-status differences are not simulated.
Employer contribution rate is treated as a simplified base rate.
